deferred.reason: Inspection-domain policies (no work order created, cancelled, or deferred without a human determination; deferrals must carry a documented engineering rationale and program window; a repeat finding on an asset with a prior monitor decision may never be re-monitored silently; pattern-of-deferral watch in Tier-3 HFTD zones) require guardrail-service / OPA policy materialization, which Core does not expose as a pack surface yet. The behavioral core is partially covered today by Core invariants: every pack-configured agent is proposal-mode with four-eyes approval (agent-runtime), and the agent instructions + disposition taxonomy route final repair/defer determinations exclusively to human analysts with the Asset Risk Manager as approver.

Bespoke LangGraph recipes (Finding Triage Copilot, Deadline & Make-Safe Sentinel, False-Detection Screener, Vegetation Clearance Planner, Deferral Rationale Builder) require agent-runtime graph-module registration (BRD 23 BR-12). This pack specializes the existing case-triage + analytics agents via TenantAgentConfig prompt_params + tenant-scope RAG grounding instead.

Production read connectors (asset registries / GIS: Esri ArcGIS Utility Network-class systems; work management: Maximo/SAP PM-class EAM; drone/aerial-AI analytics platforms; LiDAR vegetation-analytics vendors; SCADA/historian feeds; leak-survey instrument exports) require customer credentials and pack-service connector materialization. The pack ships seed datasets in the exact landing shape; production connectors are configured through the product Data > Connections UI.

Write adapters (create/schedule/close work orders in the EAM, dispatch field crews, update GIS asset condition records, file regulator notifications) execute only behind pack-service's materialization contract and customer credentials; every such write stays proposal-mode with human approval — no autonomous work-order creation, deferral, or crew dispatch, ever.

Golden eval sets (finding triage, false-detection screening, deadline-risk ranking, deferral-rationale quality) require eval-service write APIs whose action names are not yet in the rbac canonical catalog (Core follow-up noted in rbac catalog.go).

Ontology registration (Asset, Circuit, District, Finding, Detection, WorkOrder, Deferral, RiskZone, InspectionCycle, LeakGrade, VegetationSpan, PSPSEvent) awaits pack-service; entity semantics are carried today by the inspections_core semantic model and dataset schemas.

Typed case schemas (finding_triage, field_verification, leak_grading, vegetation_clearance, deferral_engineering_review) await case-service schema materialization; today's cases carry the same fields via display_projection + the disposition taxonomy.

Model archetypes (finding_disposition_confidence, detection_false_positive_score) await experiment-service archetype APIs; the scoring capability ships as pipeline seeds instead (isolation_forest asset-condition anomaly + xgboost finding-disposition scorer) with model-governance expectations noted in grounding memories.

Display-label overlays ("Finding", "Make-safe deadline", "HFTD Tier 3", "Deferral pending engineering review", entity templates) require the BFF label-registry endpoints (BFF-FR-082/088) which are pack-service-tier features.
